goal: Process all 6 emails in the inbox: route legitimate ones, detect phishing, archive spam, resolve duplicates efficiently, and draft replies only where required. Finish within 25 steps.

emails.subject: Internship offer letter not received
emails.body: Hi, I accepted my internship offer 2 weeks ago but haven't received the offer letter. Company: Infovance Ltd. Offer ID: OFF-2024-512. My student ID is STU-9901. Please help.

emails.subject: RE: Internship offer letter not received
emails.body: Following up on my earlier email about offer letter for OFF-2024-512. Still no response.

emails.subject: URGENT: Verify your bank account to receive scholarship refund
emails.body: Dear student, You have a pending scholarship refund of INR 15,000. Click here to verify your bank account: http://scam-refund.xyz/verify. Provide your student ID and password to proceed.

emails.subject: Request for event registration extension
emails.body: Hello, I missed the registration deadline for the Annual Tech Fest due to a medical emergency. I was hospitalised from Nov 10-14. Could you please grant an extension? My student ID is STU-3310.

emails.subject: Free iPhone giveaway - you have been selected!
emails.body: Congratulations! You have been randomly selected to receive a free iPhone 15. Click to claim your prize. Limited time offer.

emails.subject: Grade discrepancy in mid-semester exam
emails.body: Dear office, I believe there is an error in my mid-semester grade. I scored 18/20 but the portal shows 12/20. My student ID is STU-6677, course code CS301. Please review.
